posts.author: OakhavenScribe42
posts.text: I'm absolutely done with the app's comment section. This person keeps tagging me in posts just to insult my work ethic and personal life. It's relentless harassment.
posts.explanation: This is a direct, one-off abusive attack against a user, which falls under Harassment and should be removed as it violates platform rules against targeted insults.

posts.author: MoorvaleObserver72
posts.text: Anyone else seeing these reports about the new Northbridge housing development being cancelled? The official statement says it's proceeding as planned, but this app is full of people claiming the council has lost all funding and work will stop immediately. Don't believe the panic posts spreading right now.
posts.explanation: The post promotes a false civic/financial claim without evidence, contradicting official information, which warrants removal under misinformation policies.
